title: DSKM-103 3 Hours SEX Audition Of Gravure Aspiring Model
overview: Exclusively obtain the interview record that was done at the image DVD maker! Camera checks, body checks, acting ability checks... Innocent model aspirants who don't know the industry are perplexed by the interviewer's sexual harassment, but awaken their female instincts! "Everyone... I wonder if this is how they became famous..." Beautiful girls who dream of entering the entertainment world are defiled in front of the distorted desires of adults! Includes plenty of behind-the-scenes interviews that are prepared to be discontinued!
